name: print-element-button
description: Zero-dependency custom element that prints a single DOM element in an isolated iframe

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp print-element-button.js dist/print-element-button.js && esbuild print-element-button.js --minify --format=esm --outfile=dist/print-element-button.min.js && cp dist/print-element-button.min.js docs/print-element-button.js
